verses.esv: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, and Timothy our brother,
verses.kjv: PAUL, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Timotheus our brother,
verses.bsb: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God, and Timothy our brother,

verses.esv: To the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae:
verses.kjv: To the saints and faithful brethren in Christ which are at Colosse: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.bsb: To the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae:  Grace and peace to you from God our Father.

verses.esv: We always thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you,
verses.kjv: We give thanks to God and the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,
verses.bsb: We always thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you,

verses.esv: since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and of the love that you have for all the saints,
verses.kjv: Since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and of the love which ye have to all the saints,
verses.bsb: because we have heard about your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all the saints—

verses.esv: because of the hope laid up for you in heaven. Of this you have heard before in the word of the truth, the gospel,
verses.kjv: For the hope which is laid up for you in heaven, whereof ye heard before in the word of the truth of the gospel;
verses.bsb: the faith and love proceeding from the hope stored up for you in heaven, of which you have already heard in the word of truth, the gospel

verses.esv: which has come to you, as indeed in the whole world it is bearing fruit and increasing—as it also does among you, since the day you heard it and understood the grace of God in truth,
verses.kjv: Which is come unto you, as it is in all the world; and bringeth forth fruit, as it doth also in you, since the day ye heard of it, and knew the grace of God in truth:
verses.bsb: that has come to you.  All over the world this gospel is bearing fruit and growing, just as it has been doing among you since the day you heard it and truly understood the grace of God.

verses.esv: just as you learned it from Epaphras our beloved fellow servant. He is a faithful minister of Christ on your behalf
verses.kjv: As ye also learned of Epaphras our dear fellowservant, who is for you a faithful minister of Christ;
verses.bsb: You learned it from Epaphras, our beloved fellow servant, who is a faithful minister of Christ on our behalf,

verses.esv: and has made known to us your love in the Spirit.
verses.kjv: Who also declared unto us your love in the Spirit.
verses.bsb: and who also informed us of your love in the Spirit.

verses.esv: And so, from the day we heard, we have not ceased to pray for you, asking that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,
verses.kjv: For this cause we also, since the day we heard it, do not cease to pray for you, and to desire that ye might be filled with the knowledge of his will in all wisdom and spiritual understanding;
verses.bsb: For this reason, since the day we heard about you, we have not stopped praying for you and asking God to fill you with the knowledge of His will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,

verses.esv: so as to walk in a manner worthy of the Lord, fully pleasing to him: bearing fruit in every good work and increasing in the knowledge of God;
verses.kjv: That ye might walk worthy of the Lord unto all pleasing, being fruitful in every good work, and increasing in the knowledge of God;
verses.bsb: so that you may walk in a manner worthy of the Lord and may please Him in every way: bearing fruit in every good work, growing in the knowledge of God,

verses.esv: being strengthened with all power, according to his glorious might, for all endurance and patience with joy;
verses.kjv: Strengthened with all might, according to his glorious power, unto all patience and longsuffering with joyfulness;
verses.bsb: being strengthened with all power according to His glorious might so that you may have full endurance and patience, and joyfully

verses.esv: giving thanks to the Father, who has qualified you to share in the inheritance of the saints in light.
verses.kjv: Giving thanks unto the Father, which hath made us meet to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light:
verses.bsb: giving thanks to the Father, who has qualified you to share in the inheritance of the saints in the light.

verses.esv: He has delivered us from the domain of darkness and transferred us to the kingdom of his beloved Son,
verses.kjv: Who hath delivered us from the power of darkness, and hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son:
verses.bsb: He has rescued us from the dominion of darkness and brought us into the kingdom of His beloved Son,

verses.esv: in whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins.
verses.kjv: In whom we have redemption through his blood, even the forgiveness of sins:
verses.bsb: in whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins.

verses.esv: He is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.
verses.kjv: Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature:
verses.bsb: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn over all creation.

verses.esv: For by him all things were created, in heaven and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities—all things were created through him and for him.
verses.kjv: For by him were all things created, that are in heaven, and that are in earth, visible and invisible, whether they be thrones, or dominions, or principalities, or powers: all things were created by him, and for him:
verses.bsb: For in Him all things were created, things in heaven and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities. All things were created through Him and for Him.

verses.esv: And he is before all things, and in him all things hold together.
verses.kjv: And he is before all things, and by him all things consist.
verses.bsb: He is before all things, and in Him all things hold together.

verses.esv: And he is the head of the body, the church. He is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead, that in everything he might be preeminent.
verses.kjv: And he is the head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.
verses.bsb: And He is the head of the body, the church; He is the beginning and firstborn from among the dead, so that in all things He may have preeminence.

verses.esv: For in him all the fullness of God was pleased to dwell,
verses.kjv: For it pleased the Father that in him should all fulness dwell;
verses.bsb: For God was pleased to have all His fullness dwell in Him,

verses.esv: and through him to reconcile to himself all things, whether on earth or in heaven, making peace by the blood of his cross.
verses.kjv: And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to reconcile all things unto himself; by him, I say, whether they be things in earth, or things in heaven.
verses.bsb: and through Him to reconcile to Himself all things, whether things on earth or things in heaven, by making peace through the blood of His cross.

verses.esv: And you, who once were alienated and hostile in mind, doing evil deeds,
verses.kjv: And you, that were sometime alienated and enemies in your mind by wicked works, yet now hath he reconciled
verses.bsb: Once you were alienated from God and were hostile in your minds, engaging in evil deeds.

verses.esv: he has now reconciled in his body of flesh by his death, in order to present you holy and blameless and above reproach before him,
verses.kjv: In the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and unblameable and unreproveable in his sight:
verses.bsb: But now He has reconciled you by Christ’s physical body through death to present you holy, unblemished, and blameless in His presence—

verses.esv: if indeed you continue in the faith, stable and steadfast, not shifting from the hope of the gospel that you heard, which has been proclaimed in all creation under heaven, and of which I, Paul, became a minister.
verses.kjv: If ye continue in the faith grounded and settled, and be not moved away from the hope of the gospel, which ye have heard, and which was preached to every creature which is under heaven; whereof I Paul am made a minister;
verses.bsb: if indeed you continue in your faith, established and firm, not moved from the hope of the gospel you heard, which has been proclaimed to every creature under heaven, and of which I, Paul, have become a servant.

verses.esv: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake, and in my flesh I am filling up what is lacking in Christ's afflictions for the sake of his body, that is, the church,
verses.kjv: Who now rejoice in my sufferings for you, and fill up that which is behind of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body’s sake, which is the church:
verses.bsb: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for you, and I fill up in my flesh what is lacking in regard to Christ’s afflictions for the sake of His body, which is the church.

verses.esv: of which I became a minister according to the stewardship from God that was given to me for you, to make the word of God fully known,
verses.kjv: Whereof I am made a minister, according to the dispensation of God which is given to me for you, to fulfil the word of God;
verses.bsb: I became its servant by the commission God gave me to fully proclaim to you the word of God,

verses.esv: the mystery hidden for ages and generations but now revealed to his saints.
verses.kjv: Even the mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made manifest to his saints:
verses.bsb: the mystery that was hidden for ages and generations but is now revealed to His saints.

verses.esv: To them God chose to make known how great among the Gentiles are the riches of the glory of this mystery, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.
verses.kjv: To whom God would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
verses.bsb: To them God has chosen to make known among the Gentiles the glorious riches of this mystery, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.

verses.esv: Him we proclaim, warning everyone and teaching everyone with all wisdom, that we may present everyone mature in Christ.
verses.kjv: Whom we preach, warning every man, and teaching every man in all wisdom; that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus:
verses.bsb: We proclaim Him, admonishing and teaching everyone with all wisdom, so that we may present everyone perfect in Christ.

verses.esv: For this I toil, struggling with all his energy that he powerfully works within me.
verses.kjv: Whereunto I also labour, striving according to his working, which worketh in me mightily.
verses.bsb: To this end I also labor, striving with all His energy working powerfully within me.

verses.esv: For I want you to know how great a struggle I have for you and for those at Laodicea and for all who have not seen me face to face,
verses.kjv: FOR I would that ye knew what great conflict I have for you, and for them at Laodicea, and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;
verses.bsb: For I want you to know how much I am struggling for you and for those at Laodicea, and for all who have not met me face to face,

verses.esv: that their hearts may be encouraged, being knit together in love, to reach all the riches of full assurance of understanding and the knowledge of God's mystery, which is Christ,
verses.kjv: That their hearts might be comforted, being knit together in love, and unto all riches of the full assurance of understanding, to the acknowledgement of the mystery of God, and of the Father, and of Christ;
verses.bsb: that they may be encouraged in heart, knit together in love, and filled with the full riches of complete understanding, so that they may know the mystery of God, namely Christ,

verses.esv: in whom are hidden all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.
verses.kjv: In whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.
verses.bsb: in whom are hidden all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge.

verses.esv: I say this in order that no one may delude you with plausible arguments.
verses.kjv: And this I say, lest any man should beguile you with enticing words.
verses.bsb: I say this so that no one will deceive you by smooth rhetoric.

verses.esv: For though I am absent in body, yet I am with you in spirit, rejoicing to see your good order and the firmness of your faith in Christ.
verses.kjv: For though I be absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, joying and beholding your order, and the stedfastness of your faith in Christ.
verses.bsb: For although I am absent from you in body, I am present with you in spirit, and I delight to see your orderly condition and firm faith in Christ.

verses.esv: Therefore, as you received Christ Jesus the Lord, so walk in him,
verses.kjv: As ye have therefore received Christ Jesus the Lord, so walk ye in him:
verses.bsb: Therefore, just as you have received Christ Jesus as Lord, continue to walk in Him,

verses.esv: rooted and built up in him and established in the faith, just as you were taught, abounding in thanksgiving.
verses.kjv: Rooted and built up in him, and stablished in the faith, as ye have been taught, abounding therein with thanksgiving.
verses.bsb: rooted and built up in Him, established in the faith as you were taught, and overflowing with thankfulness.

verses.esv: See to it that no one takes you captive by philosophy and empty deceit, according to human tradition, according to the elemental spirits of the world, and not according to Christ.
verses.kjv: Beware lest any man spoil you through philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the rudiments of the world, and not after Christ.
verses.bsb: See to it that no one takes you captive through philosophy and empty deception, which are based on human tradition and the spiritual forces of the world rather than on Christ.

verses.esv: For in him the whole fullness of deity dwells bodily,
verses.kjv: For in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.
verses.bsb: For in Christ all the fullness of the Deity dwells in bodily form.

verses.esv: and you have been filled in him, who is the head of all rule and authority.
verses.kjv: And ye are complete in him, which is the head of all principality and power:
verses.bsb: And you have been made complete in Christ, who is the head over every ruler and authority.

verses.esv: In him also you were circumcised with a circumcision made without hands, by putting off the body of the flesh, by the circumcision of Christ,
verses.kjv: In whom also ye are circumcised with the circumcision made without hands, in putting off the body of the sins of the flesh by the circumcision of Christ:
verses.bsb: In Him you were also circumcised, in the putting off of your sinful nature, with the circumcision performed by Christ and not by human hands.

verses.esv: having been buried with him in baptism, in which you were also raised with him through faith in the powerful working of God, who raised him from the dead.
verses.kjv: Buried with him in baptism, wherein also ye are risen with him through the faith of the operation of God, who hath raised him from the dead.
verses.bsb: And having been buried with Him in baptism, you were raised with Him through your faith in the power of God, who raised Him from the dead.

verses.esv: And you, who were dead in your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh, God made alive together with him, having forgiven us all our trespasses,
verses.kjv: And you, being dead in your sins and the uncircumcision of your flesh, hath he quickened together with him, having forgiven you all trespasses;
verses.bsb: When you were dead in your trespasses and in the uncircumcision of your sinful nature, God made you alive with Christ. He forgave us all our trespasses,

verses.esv: by canceling the record of debt that stood against us with its legal demands. This he set aside, nailing it to the cross.
verses.kjv: Blotting out the handwriting of ordinances that was against us, which was contrary to us, and took it out of the way, nailing it to his cross;
verses.bsb: having canceled the debt ascribed to us in the decrees that stood against us. He took it away, nailing it to the cross!

verses.esv: He disarmed the rulers and authorities and put them to open shame, by triumphing over them in him.
verses.kjv: And having spoiled principalities and powers, he made a shew of them openly, triumphing over them in it.
verses.bsb: And having disarmed the powers and authorities, He made a public spectacle of them, triumphing over them by the cross.

verses.esv: Therefore let no one pass judgment on you in questions of food and drink, or with regard to a festival or a new moon or a Sabbath.
verses.kjv: Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath days:
verses.bsb: Therefore let no one judge you by what you eat or drink, or with regard to a feast, a New Moon, or a Sabbath.

verses.esv: These are a shadow of the things to come, but the substance belongs to Christ.
verses.kjv: Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body is of Christ.
verses.bsb: These are a shadow of the things to come, but the body that casts it belongs to Christ.

verses.esv: Let no one disqualify you, insisting on asceticism and worship of angels, going on in detail about visions, puffed up without reason by his sensuous mind,
verses.kjv: Let no man beguile you of your reward in a voluntary humility and worshipping of angels, intruding into those things which he hath not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,
verses.bsb: Do not let anyone who delights in false humility and the worship of angels disqualify you with speculation about what he has seen. Such a person is puffed up without basis by his unspiritual mind.

verses.esv: and not holding fast to the Head, from whom the whole body, nourished and knit together through its joints and ligaments, grows with a growth that is from God.
verses.kjv: And not holding the Head, from which all the body by joints and bands having nourishment ministered, and knit together, increaseth with the increase of God.
verses.bsb: He has lost connection to the head, from whom the whole body, supported and knit together by its joints and ligaments, grows as God causes it to grow.

verses.esv: If with Christ you died to the elemental spirits of the world, why, as if you were still alive in the world, do you submit to regulations—
verses.kjv: Wherefore if ye be dead with Christ from the rudiments of the world, why, as though living in the world, are ye subject to ordinances,
verses.bsb: If you have died with Christ to the spiritual forces of the world, why, as though you still belonged to the world, do you submit to its regulations:

verses.esv: “Do not handle, Do not taste, Do not touch”
verses.kjv: (Touch not; taste not; handle not;
verses.bsb: “Do not handle, do not taste, do not touch!”?

verses.esv: (referring to things that all perish as they are used)—according to human precepts and teachings?
verses.kjv: Which all are to perish with the using;) after the commandments and doctrines of men?
verses.bsb: These will all perish with use, because they are based on human commands and teachings.

verses.esv: These have indeed an appearance of wisdom in promoting self-made religion and asceticism and severity to the body, but they are of no value in stopping the indulgence of the flesh.
verses.kjv: Which things have indeed a shew of wisdom in will worship, and humility, and neglecting of the body; not in any honour to the satisfying of the flesh.
verses.bsb: Such restrictions indeed have an appearance of wisdom, with their self-prescribed worship, their false humility, and their harsh treatment of the body; but they are of no value against the indulgence of the flesh.

verses.esv: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated at the right hand of God.
verses.kjv: IF ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above, where Christ sitteth on the right hand of God.
verses.bsb: Therefore, since you have been raised with Christ, strive for the things above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God.

verses.esv: Set your minds on things that are above, not on things that are on earth.
verses.kjv: Set your affection on things above, not on things on the earth.
verses.bsb: Set your minds on things above, not on earthly things.

verses.esv: For you have died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
verses.kjv: For ye are dead, and your life is hid with Christ in God.
verses.bsb: For you died, and your life is now hidden with Christ in God.

verses.esv: When Christ who is your life appears, then you also will appear with him in glory.
verses.kjv: When Christ, who is our life, shall appear, then shall ye also appear with him in glory.
verses.bsb: When Christ, who is your life, appears, then you also will appear with Him in glory.

verses.esv: Put to death therefore what is earthly in you: sexual immorality, impurity, passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry.
verses.kjv: Mortify therefore your members which are upon the earth; fornication, uncleanness, inordinate affection, evil concupiscence, and covetousness, which is idolatry:
verses.bsb: Put to death, therefore, the components of your earthly nature: sexual immorality, impurity, lust, evil desires, and greed, which is idolatry.

verses.esv: On account of these the wrath of God is coming.
verses.kjv: For which things’ sake the wrath of God cometh on the children of disobedience:
verses.bsb: Because of these, the wrath of God is coming on the sons of disobedience.

verses.esv: In these you too once walked, when you were living in them.
verses.kjv: In the which ye also walked some time, when ye lived in them.
verses.bsb: When you lived among them, you also used to walk in these ways.

verses.esv: But now you must put them all away: anger, wrath, malice, slander, and obscene talk from your mouth.
verses.kjv: But now ye also put off all these; anger, wrath, malice, blasphemy, filthy communication out of your mouth.
verses.bsb: But now you must put aside all such things as these: anger, rage, malice, slander, and filthy language from your lips.

verses.esv: Do not lie to one another, seeing that you have put off the old self with its practices
verses.kjv: Lie not one to another, seeing that ye have put off the old man with his deeds;
verses.bsb: Do not lie to one another, since you have taken off the old self with its practices,

verses.esv: and have put on the new self, which is being renewed in knowledge after the image of its creator.
verses.kjv: And have put on the new man, which is renewed in knowledge after the image of him that created him:
verses.bsb: and have put on the new self, which is being renewed in knowledge in the image of its Creator.

verses.esv: Here there is not Greek and Jew, circumcised and uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave, free; but Christ is all, and in all.
verses.kjv: Where there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcision nor uncircumcision, Barbarian, Scythian, bond nor free: but Christ is all, and in all.
verses.bsb: Here there is no Greek or Jew, circumcised or uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave, or free, but Christ is all and is in all.

verses.esv: Put on then, as God's chosen ones, holy and beloved, compassionate hearts, kindness, humility, meekness, and patience,
verses.kjv: Put on therefore, as the elect of God, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering;
verses.bsb: Therefore, as the elect of God, holy and beloved, clothe yourselves with hearts of compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.

verses.esv: bearing with one another and, if one has a complaint against another, forgiving each other; as the Lord has forgiven you, so you also must forgive.
verses.kjv: Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.
verses.bsb: Bear with one another and forgive any complaint you may have against someone else. Forgive as the Lord forgave you.

verses.esv: And above all these put on love, which binds everything together in perfect harmony.
verses.kjv: And above all these things put on charity, which is the bond of perfectness.
verses.bsb: And over all these virtues put on love, which is the bond of perfect unity.

verses.esv: And let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, to which indeed you were called in one body. And be thankful.
verses.kjv: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to the which also ye are called in one body; and be ye thankful.
verses.bsb: Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, for to this you were called as members of one body. And be thankful.

verses.esv: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly, teaching and admonishing one another in all wisdom, singing psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, with thankfulness in your hearts to God.
verses.kjv: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom; teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.
verses.bsb: Let the word of Christ richly dwell within you as you teach and admonish one another with all wisdom, and as you sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs with gratitude in your hearts to God.

verses.esv: And whatever you do, in word or deed, do everything in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through him.
verses.kjv: And whatsoever ye do in word or deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God and the Father by him.
verses.bsb: And whatever you do, in word or deed, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through Him.

verses.esv: Wives, submit to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.
verses.kjv: Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as it is fit in the Lord.
verses.bsb: Wives, submit to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.

verses.esv: Husbands, love your wives, and do not be harsh with them.
verses.kjv: Husbands, love your wives, and be not bitter against them.
verses.bsb: Husbands, love your wives and do not be harsh with them.

verses.esv: Children, obey your parents in everything, for this pleases the Lord.
verses.kjv: Children, obey your parents in all things: for this is well pleasing unto the Lord.
verses.bsb: Children, obey your parents in everything, for this is pleasing to the Lord.

verses.esv: Fathers, do not provoke your children, lest they become discouraged.
verses.kjv: Fathers, provoke not your children to anger, lest they be discouraged.
verses.bsb: Fathers, do not provoke your children, so they will not become discouraged.

verses.esv: Bondservants, obey in everything those who are your earthly masters, not by way of eye-service, as people-pleasers, but with sincerity of heart, fearing the Lord.
verses.kjv: Servants, obey in all things your masters according to the flesh; not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but in singleness of heart, fearing God:
verses.bsb: Slaves, obey your earthly masters in everything, not only to please them while they are watching, but with sincerity of heart and fear of the Lord.

verses.esv: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men,
verses.kjv: And whatsoever ye do, do it heartily, as to the Lord, and not unto men;
verses.bsb: Whatever you do, work at it with your whole being, for the Lord and not for men,

verses.esv: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the inheritance as your reward. You are serving the Lord Christ.
verses.kjv: Knowing that of the Lord ye shall receive the reward of the inheritance: for ye serve the Lord Christ.
verses.bsb: because you know that you will receive an inheritance from the Lord as your reward. It is the Lord Christ you are serving.

verses.esv: For the wrongdoer will be paid back for the wrong he has done, and there is no partiality. Masters, treat your bondservants justly and fairly, knowing that you also have a Master in heaven.
verses.kjv: But he that doeth wrong shall receive for the wrong which he hath done: and there is no respect of persons.
verses.bsb: Whoever does wrong will be repaid for his wrong, and there is no favoritism.

verses.esv: Continue steadfastly in prayer, being watchful in it with thanksgiving.
verses.kjv: Continue in prayer, and watch in the same with thanksgiving;
verses.bsb: Devote yourselves to prayer, being watchful and thankful,

verses.esv: At the same time, pray also for us, that God may open to us a door for the word, to declare the mystery of Christ, on account of which I am in prison—
verses.kjv: Withal praying also for us, that God would open unto us a door of utterance, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds:
verses.bsb: as you pray also for us, that God may open to us a door for the word, so that we may proclaim the mystery of Christ, for which I am in chains.

verses.esv: that I may make it clear, which is how I ought to speak.
verses.kjv: That I may make it manifest, as I ought to speak.
verses.bsb: Pray that I may declare it clearly, as I should.

verses.esv: Walk in wisdom toward outsiders, making the best use of the time.
verses.kjv: Walk in wisdom toward them that are without, redeeming the time.
verses.bsb: Act wisely toward outsiders, redeeming the time.

verses.esv: Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt, so that you may know how you ought to answer each person.
verses.kjv: Let your speech be alway with grace, seasoned with salt, that ye may know how ye ought to answer every man.
verses.bsb: Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt, so that you may know how to answer everyone.

verses.esv: Tychicus will tell you all about my activities. He is a beloved brother and faithful minister and fellow servant in the Lord.
verses.kjv: All my state shall Tychicus declare unto you, who is a beloved brother, and a faithful minister and fellowservant in the Lord:
verses.bsb: Tychicus will tell you all the news about me. He is a beloved brother, a faithful minister, and a fellow servant in the Lord.

verses.esv: I have sent him to you for this very purpose, that you may know how we are and that he may encourage your hearts,
verses.kjv: Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that he might know your estate, and comfort your hearts;
verses.bsb: I have sent him to you for this very purpose, that you may know about us, and that he may encourage your hearts.

verses.esv: and with him Onesimus, our faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will tell you of everything that has taken place here.
verses.kjv: With Onesimus, a faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They shall make known unto you all things which are done here.
verses.bsb: With him I am sending Onesimus, our faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will tell you about everything here.

verses.esv: Aristarchus my fellow prisoner greets you, and Mark the cousin of Barnabas (concerning whom you have received instructions—if he comes to you, welcome him),
verses.kjv: Aristarchus my fellowprisoner saluteth you, and Marcus, sister’s son to Barnabas, (touching whom ye received commandments: if he come unto you, receive him;)
verses.bsb: My fellow prisoner Aristarchus sends you greetings, as does Mark the cousin of Barnabas. You have already received instructions about him: If he comes to you, welcome him.

verses.esv: and Jesus who is called Justus. These are the only men of the circumcision among my fellow workers for the kingdom of God, and they have been a comfort to me.
verses.kjv: And Jesus, which is called Justus, who are of the circumcision. These only are my fellowworkers unto the kingdom of God, which have been a comfort unto me.
verses.bsb: Jesus, who is called Justus, also sends greetings. These are the only Jews among my fellow workers for the kingdom of God, and they have been a comfort to me.

verses.esv: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ Jesus, greets you, always struggling on your behalf in his prayers, that you may stand mature and fully assured in all the will of God.
verses.kjv: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, saluteth you, always labouring fervently for you in prayers, that ye may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.
verses.bsb: Epaphras, who is one of you and a servant of Christ Jesus, sends you greetings. He is always wrestling in prayer for you, so that you may stand mature and fully assured in the full will of God.

verses.esv: For I bear him witness that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and in Hierapolis.
verses.kjv: For I bear him record, that he hath a great zeal for you, and them that are in Laodicea, and them in Hierapolis.
verses.bsb: For I testify about him that he goes to great pains for you and for those at Laodicea and Hierapolis.

verses.esv: Luke the beloved physician greets you, as does Demas.
verses.kjv: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas, greet you.
verses.bsb: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas send you greetings.

verses.esv: Give my greetings to the brothers at Laodicea, and to Nympha and the church in her house.
verses.kjv: Salute the brethren which are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the church which is in his house.
verses.bsb: Greet the brothers in Laodicea, as well as Nympha and the church that meets at her house.

verses.esv: And when this letter has been read among you, have it also read in the church of the Laodiceans; and see that you also read the letter from Laodicea.
verses.kjv: And when this epistle is read among you, cause that it be read also in the church of the Laodiceans; and that ye likewise read the epistle from Laodicea.
verses.bsb: After this letter has been read among you, make sure that it is also read in the church of the Laodiceans, and that you in turn read the letter from Laodicea.

verses.esv: And say to Archippus, “See that you fulfill the ministry that you have received in the Lord.”
verses.kjv: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in the Lord, that thou fulfil it.
verses.bsb: Tell Archippus: “See to it that you complete the ministry you have received in the Lord.”

verses.esv: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. Remember my chains. Grace be with you.
verses.kjv: The salutation by the hand of me Paul. Remember my bonds. Grace be with you. Amen. ¶ Written from Rome to the Colossians by Tychicus and Onesimus. THE
verses.bsb: This greeting is in my own hand—Paul.  Remember my chains.  Grace be with you.
